creator: mph@astro.psu.edu
text:
On Tue, May 05, 1998 at 05:16:17PM +1000, Maurice Castro wrote:

> 		- please change name of port from `r' to `R' (correct name)

This was a deliberate chenge when I committed the port.  As stated
in the Handbook, the package name is to be all lower-case letters
except for major packages.

-- 
Matthew Hunt <mph@pobox.com> * Stay close to the Vorlon.
